name: Valerie — Refreshing
description:
(AnyPOV version) **Your boss who's trying to quit smoking, and seems to be fixated on your lips...**
___
*AnyPOV version of the same character as requested, am actually a bit interested to see which one will do better numbers. Might consider making both POV version for the same character in the future (Assuming the scenario will still make sense).*
*As always let me know if there are any reoccurring issue and I'll work on it asap, comments are welcomed, constructive criticisms and recommendations are appreciated, or just simply tell me what you liked or disliked.*
